description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a metallic silver barrel and a teal-colored synthetic stock and fore-end. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a black tubular magazine running parallel beneath it. The receiver area features a greenish accent, and the trigger assembly is housed within a black, rounded trigger guard. The stock is full-sized, angular, and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support, with a slightly textured appearance. The fore-end is robust and ribbed, designed for manual operation of the pump mechanism. Overall, the shotgun has a modern, utilitarian look suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern pump-action shotgun with a silver barrel, teal synthetic stock, and black magazine tube, featuring a robust, ergonomic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the teal stock, silver barrel, black magazine tube, and green receiver accent.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle of the barrel and the alignment of the magazine tube beneath it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same features as view 0, with the teal stock and black trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the teal stock and the linear alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with a parallel magazine tube beneath
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
